---
title: "Bootstrap Estimation for Boston Housing"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Example Vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
bibliography: bibliography.bib
nocite: "@*"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 6,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)
```

# AI Statement

No AI tools were used in the generation of this vignette. All code and writing were produced by the authors.

# Overview

# Data

# Functions and Usage

# Bootstrap + Linear Regression Assumptions

# Bibliography
